caption: A man with a shaved head, a full beard, and tattoos on his right arm is recording in a studio against a dark grey, textured acoustic foam wall. He wears a white t-shirt and large black over-ear headphones. A silver professional microphone, mounted on a black boom arm with the text "RØDE" visible on its side, is positioned in front of him. Across the sequence, the man is speaking and gesturing. Initially, he is seen from a slight angle with a neutral expression. As time progresses, he opens his mouth to speak and begins gesturing with his right hand, moving it upward and then outward to emphasize his points. His facial expression shifts from focused to active communication, while the camera angle and studio setting remain constant.
